calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Morris in Propria Persona.
Tree Tam (Decedent's Daughter) also present.

The Court informed Mr. Morris that a revised proposed order with a full legal description of the Oakland property is needed. The Court also advised Ms. Tam that she is entitled to direct notice of the petition. Ms. Tam stated that she waives any defect with notice. The Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution is continued to June 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 Mr. Morris to provide a proper form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
